revision.text:
{{Object | Name=AR-15 | Guid=3055-7646 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Z1_Battle_Royale | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=AT-RT | Guid=3055-7291 | Deck=Short for "All-Terrain Reconissance Transport", the AT-RT served as the Clone Army's equivalent to the Empire's AT-ST. Though much smaller and far less well armored, it was also faster and more nimble, and was a reliable scouting vehicle. Most commonly used by ARF Troopers. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/ARF_Trooper,Concepts/Clone_Troopers,Concepts/Clone_Wars,Concepts/Galactic_Empire,Concepts/Galactic_Republic,Concepts/Scout_Trooper,Concepts/Stormtrooper | Franchises= | Games=Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_III_The_Clone_Wars,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Complete_Saga,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Skywalker_Saga,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Video_Game,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront_II,Games/Star_Wars_Force_Arena,Games/Star_Wars_Galaxies_An_Empire_Divided,Games/Star_Wars_Jedi_Fallen_Order | Locations=Locations/Christophsis,Locations/Felucia,Locations/Geonosis,Locations/Kashyyyk | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3499348-screenshot2023-09-03173614.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3499348-screenshot2023-09-03173614.png","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_small,scale_super,square_medium,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Short for "All-Terrain Reconissance Transport", the AT-RT served as the Clone Army's equivalent to the Empire's AT-ST. Though much smaller and far less well armored, it was also faster and more nimble, and was a reliable scouting vehicle. Most commonly used by ARF Troopers.

{{Object | Name=AT-TE | Guid=3055-7292 | Deck=Short for "All-Terrain Tactical Enforcer". The spiritual predecessor to the more famous AT-AT, it saw heavy use throughout the Clone Wars. | Characters=Characters/Ahsoka_Tano,Characters/Captain_Rex,Characters/Commander_Cody,Characters/Darth_Vader,Characters/Obi_Wan_Kenobi | Concepts=Concepts/Clone_Pilot,Concepts/Clone_Troopers,Concepts/Clone_Wars,Concepts/Galactic_Empire,Concepts/Galactic_Republic | Franchises= | Games=Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_III_The_Clone_Wars,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Complete_Saga,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Skywalker_Saga,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Video_Game,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront_II,Games/Star_Wars_Galactic_Battlegrounds_Clone_Campaigns,Games/Star_Wars_Jedi_Fallen_Order,Games/Star_Wars_Republic_Commando,Games/Star_Wars_The_Clone_Wars | Locations=Locations/Christophsis,Locations/Felucia,Locations/Geonosis,Locations/Kashyyyk,Locations/Utapau | People= | Objects=Objects/Laser | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3500632-databank_attewalker_01_169_4292c02c.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3500632-databank_attewalker_01_169_4292c02c.jpg","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Short for "All-Terrain Tactical Enforcer". The spiritual predecessor to the more famous AT-AT, it saw heavy use throughout the Clone Wars.

{{Object | Name=Abacus | Guid=3055-7709 | Deck=An abacus is an ancient mathematical tool using sliding beads. | Characters=Characters/Deacon_St_John | Concepts=Concepts/Math | Franchises= | Games=Games/Days_Gone,Games/The_Sims_3 | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/Earth,Locations/England,Locations/Europe,Locations/Middle_East,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/United_Kingdom | People= | Objects=Objects/Bead,Objects/Calculator,Objects/Wood | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3731780-1pc-abacus-math-learning-toy-kids-educational-toys-children-math-learning-tool_d6e41de9-5456-4436-9892-86bb433bc765.64696b1dc29a1df52f4c99e457aa7f69.jpeg.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3731780-1pc-abacus-math-learning-toy-kids-educational-toys-children-math-learning-tool_d6e41de9-5456-4436-9892-86bb433bc765.64696b1dc29a1df52f4c99e457aa7f69.jpeg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> An abacus is an ancient mathematical tool using sliding beads.

{{Object | Name=Admiral Robert Roddam | Guid=3055-7725 | Deck=Painting by Lemuel Francis Abbott | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Painter | Franchises= | Games=Games/Condemned_Criminal_Origins | Locations=Locations/Art_Museum,Locations/Library | People= | Objects=Objects/Paint,Objects/Paint_Brush,Objects/Paintings | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3776297-admiral_robert_roddam.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3776297-admiral_robert_roddam.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,square_medium,scale_tiny,square_tiny,scale_small,scale_super,square_avatar,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Painting by Lemuel Francis Abbott

{{Object | Name=Aegis | Guid=3055-7516 | Deck=Aegis is essentially the "all-rounder" jet in Raiden Fighters. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Raiden_Fighters,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Aces,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Remix_Collection,Games/Raiden_Legacy | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Fighter_Jet | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3630874-7505604248-latest.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3630874-7505604248-latest.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Aegis is essentially the "all-rounder" jet in Raiden Fighters.

{{Object | Name=Aérospatiale Concorde | Guid=3055-7360 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Air_Bucks | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Akavari Sunderblade | Guid=3055-7715 | Deck=The Akavari Sunderblade is a one-handed longsword that is a unique object in The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/The_Elder_Scrolls_IV_Oblivion,Games/The_Elder_Scrolls_IV_Oblivion_Remastered | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Katana,Objects/Sword | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/46/3752003-akavirikatana.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3752003-akavirikatana.png","path":"0\/46\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Akavari Sunderblade is a one-handed longsword that is a unique object in The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion

{{Object | Name=Alfa Romeo 156 | Guid=3055-7566 | Deck=Alfa Romeo's 155 sedan was popular with enthusiasts because of its flawless mix of sport and comfort. So for the next generation car, the 156, Alfa Romeo made sure it gave its core customers what they wanted... and then some. When it was unveiled in 1997, the 156 surprised many with its bold new looks, With a nod to the classic Giulietta and Giulia models, the styling was a fusion of 4-door body and 2-door coupe that took sports-sedan design in a whole new direction. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Alfa_Romeo,Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Gran_Turismo_2009,Games/Gran_Turismo_3_A_Spec,Games/Gran_Turismo_4,Games/Kaido_Battle_2_Chain_Reaction,Games/Metropolis_Street_Racer,Games/SCAR_Squadra_Corse_Alfa_Romeo,Games/Sega_GT,Games/Sega_GT_Online,Games/STCC_The_Game,Games/The_Getaway,Games/Toca_World_Touring_Cars,Games/Top_Drives,Games/World_Racing,Games/World_Racing_2 | Locations=Locations/Italy | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3646162-1168431202-1000.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3646162-1168431202-1000.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_small,square_small,square_tiny,scale_super,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Alfa Romeo's 155 sedan was popular with enthusiasts because of its flawless mix of sport and comfort. So for the next generation car, the 156, Alfa Romeo made sure it gave its core customers what they wanted... and then some. When it was unveiled in 1997, the 156 surprised many with its bold new looks, With a nod to the classic Giulietta and Giulia models, the styling was a fusion of 4-door body and 2-door coupe that took sports-sedan design in a whole new direction.

{{Object | Name=Alfa Romeo 158 | Guid=3055-7603 | Deck=Grand Prix racing car produced by Italian manufacturer Alfa Romeo. It is one of the most successful racing cars ever; the 158 and its derivative, the 159, took 47 wins from 54 Grands Prix entered. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Alfa_Romeo,Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/The_1940s | Franchises= | Games=Games/Formula_One_06,Games/Forza_Motorsport_7 | Locations=Locations/Italy | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3646158-2958949786-1000.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3646158-2958949786-1000.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> It is an unlockable classic car in Formula One 06.

{{Object | Name=Alpine A424 | Guid=3055-7693 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Le_Mans_Ultimate | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Alpinia | Guid=3055-7424 | Deck=One of three playable ships in Konami's Solar Assault. It made a reappearance in the Otomedius series. | Characters=Characters/Strarf | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Otomedius_Excellent,Games/Solar_Assault | Locations=Locations/Space | People= | Objects=Objects/Spaceship | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3593186-6950556426-latest.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3593186-6950556426-latest.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_small,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> One of three playable ships in Konami's Solar Assault. It made a reappearance in the Otomedius series.

{{Object | Name=Armor Rack | Guid=3055-7767 | Deck=An armor stand is an inanimate entity that can wear armor. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Shopping | Franchises= | Games=Games/Fallout_4,Games/Going_Medieval,Games/Minecraft,Games/Sons_of_the_Forest,Games/The_Elder_Scrolls_V_Skyrim,Games/The_Forest | Locations=Locations/Skyrim | People= | Objects=Objects/Armor,Objects/Mannequin,Objects/Plate_Armor }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> An armor stand is an inanimate entity that can wear armor.

{{Object | Name=Armored Bus | Guid=3055-7729 | Deck=A special version of a regular bus, hung with additional fortifications: armor, window grilles, a battering ram. It is usually found on the territory of prisons for the transportation of criminals and in the genres of diesel-punk | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Convict,Concepts/One_Person_Drives_While_The_Other_Shoots,Concepts/Police,Concepts/SWAT,Concepts/Vehicular_Combat | Franchises= | Games=Games/Condemned_2_Bloodshot,Games/inFamous_Second_Son,Games/Injustice_2,Games/Silent_Hill_Downpour,Games/The_Suffering | Locations=Locations/Prison | People= | Objects=Objects/Armored_Car,Objects/Armored_Personnel_Carrier,Objects/Bus,Objects/Car,Objects/Grate,Objects/Gun,Objects/Military_Truck,Objects/School_Bus | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3778261-silenthilldownpour.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3778261-silenthilldownpour.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,square_avatar,scale_tiny,scale_medium","caption":"Silent Hill: Downpour - Armored Bus"},"background":[]}' /> Not to be confused with armored personnel carriers and police vans.

{{Object | Name=Aston Martin DB11 | Guid=3055-7632 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Project_CARS_3 | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Aston Martin DBS | Guid=3055-7713 | Deck=Aston Martin DBS was a grand touring sports car with a straight six engine. | Characters=Characters/James_Bond | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/007_First_Light,Games/CSR_Classics,Games/Epic_Car_Factory,Games/Forza_Horizon_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2023,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/United_Kingdom | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3751255-img_3227.jpeg }}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Audi A4 | Guid=3055-7615 | Deck=The Audi A4 is a line of luxury compact executive cars produced since 1994 by the German car manufacturer Audi, a subsidiary of the Volkswagen Group. The A4 has been built in five generations and is based on the Volkswagen Group B platform. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Audi,Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Asphalt_8_Airborne,Games/Driver_San_Francisco,Games/Enthusia_Professional_Racing,Games/Forza_Horizon,Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/GRID_Autosport,Games/GRID_Legends,Games/Need_for_Speed_Edge,Games/Need_for_Speed_Hot_Pursuit,Games/Need_for_Speed_Most_Wanted,Games/Need_for_Speed_The_Run,Games/Sega_GT,Games/Swedish_Touring_Car_Championship,Games/TOCA_2_Touring_Car_Challenge,Games/TOCA_Touring_Car_Championship,Games/Toca_World_Touring_Cars,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/Germany | People= | Objects=Objects/Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3646947-0049210160-1200.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3646947-0049210160-1200.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_tiny,square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Audi A4 is a line of luxury compact executive cars produced since 1994 by the German car manufacturer Audi, a subsidiary of the Volkswagen Group. The A4 has been built in five generations and is based on the Volkswagen Group B platform.

{{Object | Name=Audi R8 | Guid=3055-7386 | Deck=The Audi R8 is a mid engine sports car that was the final project of the Le Mans Quattro. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Audi | Franchises= | Games=Games/Asphalt_6_Adrenaline,Games/Forza_Motorsport_3,Games/Forza_Motorsport_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Forza_Motorsport_7,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_5_Prologue,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_7,Games/Gran_Turismo_Sport,Games/Need_for_Speed_Most_Wanted_2012,Games/Need_for_Speed_Nitro,Games/Need_for_Speed_No_Limits,Games/Need_for_Speed_Payback,Games/Need_for_Speed_ProStreet,Games/Need_for_Speed_The_Run,Games/Need_for_Speed_Unbound,Games/Real_Racing_3 | Locations=Locations/Germany | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3811637-img_3485.jpeg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3811637-img_3485.jpeg","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Audi R8 is a mid engine sports car that was the final project of the Le Mans Quattro.

{{Object | Name=Autograph | Guid=3055-7681 | Deck=A personal signature on something | Characters=Characters/Dan_Hibiki,Characters/Johnny_Cage | Concepts=Concepts/Friendship | Franchises= | Games=Games/CSI_Crime_Scene_Investigation_Hard_Evidence,Games/Marvel_Super_Heroes_Vs_Street_Fighter,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_2_New_Age_of_Heroes,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_Clash_of_Super_Heroes,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_Fighting_Collection_Arcade_Classics,Games/Mortal_Kombat_1,Games/Mortal_Kombat_2011,Games/Mortal_Kombat_II,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Trilogy | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Marker,Objects/Mechanical_Pencil,Objects/Paper,Objects/Pencil | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3716244-mktri.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3716244-mktri.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_avatar,scale_tiny,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_avatar,scale_large,square_mini,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":"Mortal Kombat Trilogy"},"background":[]}' /> A personal signature on something

{{Object | Name=Avocado | Guid=3055-7333 | Deck=The Avocado is a fruit that is native to the Americas. It is the main ingredient in guacamole, and very common among Mexican and Mexican-American foods. | Characters=Characters/Gru,Characters/Takayuki_Yagami | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/AvoCuddle,Games/Lost_Judgment,Games/Project_Zomboid,Games/The_Sims_4,Games/Wheres_My_Avocado | Locations=Locations/Arizona,Locations/Asia,Locations/California,Locations/Costa_Rica,Locations/Earth,Locations/Guatemala,Locations/Humboldt_County,Locations/Japan,Locations/Kamurocho,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/Mexico,Locations/Mexico_City,Locations/New_Mexico,Locations/North_America,Locations/Puerto_Rico,Locations/South_America,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/Taco_Bell_Cantina,Locations/Texas,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Tokyo,Locations/Ventura_County | People= | Objects=Objects/Fruit,Objects/Grenade,Objects/Guacamole | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3511760-002599549.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3511760-002599549.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Avocado is a fruit that is native to the Americas. It is the main ingredient in guacamole, and very common among Mexican and Mexican-American foods.

{{Object | Name=BMF Championship Belt | Guid=3055-7629 | Deck=The BMF (Baddest Mother Fucker) Belt is a championship that exists beyond weight classes that is supposed to signify fighters that put it all on the line in their fights. | Characters=Characters/Jorge_Masvidal | Concepts=Concepts/Hand_to_Hand_Combat,Concepts/Mixed_Martial_Arts,Concepts/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_UFC_5 | Locations=Locations/Octagon_Ring | People= | Objects=Objects/Belt,Objects/UFC_Championship_Belt | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3650950-ufc_bmf_replicabelt_1_jpg.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3650950-ufc_bmf_replicabelt_1_jpg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The BMF (Baddest Mother Fucker) Belt is a championship that exists beyond weight classes that is supposed to signify fighters that put it all on the line in their fights.

{{Object | Name=BMP-2 | Guid=3055-7413 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Military,Concepts/The_1980s | Franchises= | Games=Games/Armored_Warfare,Games/Combat_Mission_Afghanistan,Games/Combat_Mission_Black_Sea,Games/Combat_Mission_Shock_Force,Games/Spec_Ops_Covert_Assault | Locations=Locations/Russia | People= | Objects=Objects/Armored_Personnel_Carrier | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3570384-2708974523-latest.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3570384-2708974523-latest.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_small,scale_medium,square_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=BMW 645Ci | Guid=3055-7625 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/MotoGP_4 | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=BMW 740i | Guid=3055-7636 | Deck=The BMW 740i is a road car produced by BMW. It only appears in Gran Turismo 2. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/Germany | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3653380-7366717108-latest.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3653380-7366717108-latest.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The BMW 740i is a road car produced by BMW. It only appears in Gran Turismo 2.

revision.comment: Restore content truncated by the legacy migration (3055-7307, guid-audit)
revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Beretta 418 | Guid=3055-7307 | Deck=The Beretta 418 was a Italian pocket pistol that is manufactured by Beretta. | Characters=Characters/James_Bond,Characters/Rosa_Klebb | Concepts=Concepts/First_Person_Perspective,Concepts/Spies,Concepts/Top_Down_Perspective | Franchises= | Games=Games/007_Legends,Games/GoldenEye_007_Reloaded,Games/Quantum_of_Solace | Locations=Locations/Italy | People= | Objects=Objects/Gun,Objects/Pistol,Objects/Silencer | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3510507-img_0845.gif }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3510507-img_0845.gif","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/gif","sizes":"square_medium,square_tiny,scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
The Beretta 418 was a .25 caliber compact pocket pistol that was manufactured by Italy in the 1919 to 1922. The pistol was designed before the First World War when the Beretta company gave the precedence to develop the 6.35x15mmSR (.25 ACP) with a seven to eight round capacity. The spring loading firing pin rather than a internal hammer of the 418. For the 418, the detrimental was possibility made due to the considerations of the size of this gun. The mechanics of this pistol with a low recoil and little stopping power this 418 for the firing mechanism making the pistol more weaker.
==Popular Culture== '''James Bond Franchise:'''
The Beretta 418 was used by James Bond in Ian Fleming’s various novels as his undercover work for many missions as a British spy.
==='''Quantum of Solace'''=== In the DS version of Quantum of Solace, the Beretta 418 was named to GF-17 which is weaker is another reference to Ian Fleming’s novel arcs while Daniel Craig’s Bond didn’t use the 418 in Craig’s film mission arcs he uses his PPK instead.
==='''Goldeneye Reloaded'''=== In Goldeneye Reloaded, Rosa Klebb‘s signature weapon was a Pearl Grip 418/Beretta 418 instead of her Llama Model XVIII, after the scene was cut.

{{Object | Name=Beretta Cougar | Guid=3055-7418 | Characters=Characters/Ethan_Hunt | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games= | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3607555-img_2392.jpeg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3607555-img_2392.jpeg","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Beretta M1934 | Guid=3055-7306 | Deck=The Beretta M1934 was an Italian sub-compact pistol for the Royal Italian Army. | Characters=Characters/James_Bond | Concepts=Concepts/First_Person_Perspective,Concepts/Military,Concepts/Spies | Franchises= | Games=Games/Enlisted,Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle,Games/Medal_of_Honor_Allied_Assault,Games/Quantum_of_Solace | Locations=Locations/Italy | People= | Objects=Objects/Gun,Objects/Pistol | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3510500-img_0846.jpeg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3510500-img_0846.jpeg","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_tiny,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Beretta M1934 was a semi-automatic service pistol was announced in 1934. This pistol was issued by NCOs, officers and machine gun crews. With a .380 ACP/9x19mm Corto was less powerful than other military service pistols with a seven round capacity when the magazine was removed, it no longer holds the slide back to it’s Beretta. '''In Popular Culture''' In Dr. No, Bond’s M1934 was jammed for previous missions after Bond was recovered from the hospital so M provided Boothroyd a new pistol, the [[Objects/Walther_PPK|Walther PPK]] that is more powerful than a M1934. Bone is trying to sneak his M1934 out but M wasn’t deceived by Bond’s actions so M tells Bond to leave his M1934 on M’s desk immediately before Bond moves out to Jamaica for his mission. In Quantum of Solace PS2 version, the CR 1911 pistol resembles the M1934 that were carried by Quantum mercenaries.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Blasting Machine | Guid=3055-7539 | Aliases=Plunger,Detonator | Deck=A metal box with a handle for detonating explosives such as dynamite from a safe distance. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Engineer,Concepts/Falling_Object,Concepts/Minerals,Concepts/Mining,Concepts/Resource_Gathering | Franchises= | Games=Games/Banjo_Tooie,Games/Conkers_Bad_Fur_Day,Games/Hidden_Runaway,Games/Obduction,Games/Rage,Games/Rolling,Games/Runaway_A_Road_Adventure,Games/Soccer_Kid | Locations=Locations/Mine,Locations/Mountains | People= | Objects=Objects/Boulder,Objects/Crystal,Objects/Dynamite,Objects/Explosives,Objects/Jewel,Objects/Miners_Helmet,Objects/Pickaxe,Objects/Rock,Objects/Rubble | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3644109-rage%282011%29.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3644109-rage(2011).jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,square_medium,square_small,scale_super,square_avatar,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":"Rage (2011)"},"background":[]}' /> A metal box with a handle for detonating explosives such as dynamite from a safe distance.

{{Object | Name=Blueberry | Guid=3055-7323 | Deck=Blueberries are very popular, sweet berries used commonly in smoothies and salads. | Characters=Characters/Takayuki_Yagami | Concepts=Concepts/Eating | Franchises= | Games=Games/Adventure_of_Little_Ralph,Games/Dragons_Dogma_II,Games/Lost_Judgment,Games/Project_Zomboid,Games/Rust,Games/Sons_of_the_Forest,Games/Stardew_Valley,Games/The_Forest | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Japan,Locations/McDonalds,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Tokyo | People= | Objects=Objects/Berries,Objects/Fruit,Objects/Ice_Cream,Objects/Jam,Objects/Pie,Objects/Salad,Objects/Strawberry | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3511749-blueberry-seed-carrier-oil.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Buckwheat Flour | Guid=3055-7338 | Deck=Buckwheat flour is the granulation of buckwheat. It is naturally gluten free, and healthier than regular flour. | Characters=Characters/May_Parker,Characters/Peter_Parker | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2 | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Baking_Ingredients,Objects/Wheatcakes | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3514146-buckwheat-flour2.jpg }}

It is naturally gluten free, and healthier than regular flour.

{{Object | Name=Bulgogi | Guid=3055-7312 | Deck=Bulgogi is a Korean-styled barbecue dish that is typically served with rice! | Characters=Characters/Takayuki_Yagami | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Lost_Judgment | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/California,Locations/Georgia,Locations/Gyu_Kaku,Locations/Japan,Locations/Korea,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/North_America,Locations/South_Korea,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Ventura_County | People= | Objects=Objects/Barbecue_Grill,Objects/Beef,Objects/Hot_Sauce,Objects/Kimchi,Objects/Meat,Objects/Rice | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3511488-korean-beef-bulgogiimg_9246.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3511488-korean-beef-bulgogiimg_9246.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_super,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Bulgogi is a Korean-styled barbecue dish that is typically served with rice!
